images.auto_caption: Botanical-style flower stickers arranged on the kraft paper cover of a spiral notebook.
Botanical illustration sticker of a yellow crocus on kraft paper, with partial plant stickers visible at the edges.
Botanical-style sticker of a yellow cactus bloom on kraft paper, with a second sticker partially visible below.
Botanical flower stickers on kraft paper, featuring a yellow buttercup and partial tiger lily, with a fern sticker in the corner.
Botanical illustration sticker of a yellow cactus flower on kraft paper, with partial fruit stickers visible at the edges.
Botanical floral sticker with yellow blooms on a kraft-covered spiral notebook.
Botanical lily sticker on kraft paper, resting on striped blue and red fabric.
Vintage-style lemon sticker on kraft cardboard, with striped fabric visible below.
Ornate decorative sticker with gold foliage and a red gem centerpiece on a blue paper surface above a wood floor.
Two ornate black gothic-style arrow/divider stickers on a gray surface, featuring intricate scrollwork and compass rose medallions.
Ornate decorative key-shaped stickers with intricate black filigree designs on a gray surface, alongside partial colorful stickers.
Folk art floral sticker on the cover of a lavender spiral notebook.
Die-cut sticker with an Egyptian-inspired botanical motif in blue, yellow, olive, and red on a grey surface.
Folk art floral sticker on a lavender felt surface, with intricate red, orange, blue, and green scrollwork in a traditional rosemaling style.
Two cut-out fabric or paper pieces with folk-art floral designs, laid on a gray felt surface.
Two decorative stickers on a gray spiral notebook — one featuring a gold whale with floral motifs on a blue medallion background.
Die-cut sticker with an Ottoman-inspired floral medallion in blue, red, and cream, placed on a gray surface alongside partial matching stickers.
Die-cut sticker with a detailed mandala-style floral design in blue, green, and red, laid on a grey surface alongside partial duplicates.
Die-cut sticker with a Moorish-style tile motif in red and cream, lying on a grey surface alongside other decorative stickers.
Hexagonal board game tile with an intricate geometric pattern in green, red, and cream, laid on a gray felt surface.
Red poinsettia fabric sticker on a gray felt surface, with partial glimpses of other holiday stickers at the edges.
Hexagonal tile or game piece with intricate Islamic geometric pattern in red, black, and cream, laid on a grey felt surface.
Fabric star patch with a geometric mandala pattern in cream, dark olive, and black, resting on a gray textured surface.
Vintage-style compass rose sticker on a gray felt surface. Black and cream tones give it an old nautical map feel.
Round fabric patch with a sun/eye motif in olive green on blush pink, laid on a gray textile surface alongside other partial patches.
Hexagonal fabric quilt block in dark olive, red, and white, laid on a gray felt surface alongside partial pink oval pieces.
Quatrefoil-shaped sticker with intricate gold floral motifs on a blue ground, laid on a gray surface.
Eight-pointed star coaster or patch with Iznik-style floral motifs in gold and red on a pale blue background, laid flat on grey surface.
Yellow and black geometric flower sticker on a grey surface, with partial stickers visible at the edges.
Octagonal sticker with a gold and black eight-pointed star quilt block design, resting on blue felt.
Small illustrated patch on a gray fabric surface, depicting a white building with a brown roof beside a green tree.
Two patches on a gray surface — one shows a stylized yellow fish with a dorsal fin and floral eye, the other a dark lotus design.
Small decorative card featuring a dark floral medallion with copper-toned detailing, set against a black border with dot accents.
Small vintage-style illustrated card showing a swan with wings raised, printed on pink with engraving-style linework, mounted on gray backing.
Small illustrated trade or cigarette card depicting a spoked flywheel or pulley, laid on a blue textured surface alongside other cards.
Fabric patch showing a close-up illustration of a nose with a red drop, comic-book style linework on a gray surface.
Small antique illustrated card showing a figure tumbling backward, top hat flying off, mid-fall. Comic, chaotic energy in aged print style.
Vintage illustrated card showing a tabby cat playing a violin while mice dance below.
Fabric patch with a vintage botanical illustration of carrots and leafy greens, laid on a blue textile surface alongside other similar patches.
Tarot card showing an overturned cup with roses spilling out — likely the reversed Ace of Cups. Printed on blue fabric alongside other cards.
Vintage engraving-style card depicting a pointing hand with ruffled cuff, laid on a gray fabric surface.
Vintage illustrated panel showing an adult figure with two children on a staircase, rendered in classic engraving-style crosshatching with muted colors.
Embroidered patch of two interlocking gold rings on a gray fabric surface. Bold graphic style with black outlines.
Single Ferrero Rocher chocolate in crinkled gold foil, sitting on its paper cup on a worn wooden cutting board.
Black stickers on a kraft sketchbook page — a detailed sacred geometry mandala with dandelion nodes, plus a smaller decorative banner design below.
Black scallop-edged sticker with intricate white sacred geometry and dandelion motifs, placed on a kraft paper sketchbook.
Round sticker with a detailed black-and-white macro image of a sand dollar's surface, resting on kraft paper.
Intricate white-on-black illustration with botanical and wave motifs, die-cut into a butterfly shape, resting on a kraft cardboard surface.
Black die-cut sticker of a radiolarian or Ernst Haeckel-style microscopic organism, stuck to a kraft cardboard surface.
Black die-cut sticker with detailed white illustration of a spiky botanical or sea urchin-like form, stuck to cardboard.
Black mandala sticker with intricate white radial pattern resting on a wooden kalimba body.
Dark botanical sticker with intricate black-and-white illustration of a seed pod or flower head, lying on tan cardboard.
Decorative stickers with medieval-style botanical motifs on a kraft paper spiral notebook cover. Deep red and gold tones give the designs a rich, illuminated-manuscript feel.
Sticker sheet featuring intricate botanical and mandala-style die-cut designs in warm earthy tones, laid on a wooden surface.

Botanical illustration stickers on kraft paper, featuring intricate cross-section designs in teal, gold, and red. Likely microscopic or decorative plant structures printed in a vintage scientific style.
Kaleidoscopic floral sticker with red petals and star motifs, laid on kraft paper alongside partial views of similar decorative stickers.
Circular sticker with a retro floral mandala design — dark green petals on a red background with yellow dots, printed on fabric or felt.
Ernst Haeckel-style jellyfish illustration sticker on a kraft spiral notebook, with two smaller biological art stickers in the corners.
Die-cut sticker of a sea creature or nudibranch illustration, earthy reds and tans, on a wooden surface alongside other nature-themed stickers.
Star-shaped sticker depicting a sea urchin or starfish, with yellow-green patterned surface and red spots, on a wood background.
Circular sticker with a detailed mandala-like biological illustration in pink, yellow, and black, laid on a wooden surface alongside other stickers.
Intricate red and gold floral sticker with a mandala-like design, resting on a soft beige fabric surface.
Die-cut sticker of a detailed vintage scientific illustration of a sea creature, likely from Ernst Haeckel's *Kunstformen der Natur*, on a kraft notebook cover.
Two botanical/marine illustration stickers on a cardboard surface — a detailed starfish in red and olive tones, plus a partial spiky red sea creature.
Die-cut sticker of a red spiky sea creature on a pale blue background, laid on kraft cardboard with other botanical-style stickers nearby.
Vintage-style sea creature stickers on a kraft paper surface. The largest features a detailed starfish illustration; smaller ones show echinoderm specimens in muted tones.
Fabric sticker of a deep red multi-armed sea star on a light blue scalloped backing, resting on kraft cardboard.
Cut-out fabric sticker with a deep red folk art rosette on a light blue background, resting on kraft cardboard alongside other partial cut-outs.
Vintage-style starfish illustration sticker on a light blue scalloped backing, laid on kraft cardboard alongside partial caterpillar stickers.
Round sticker with a ornate floral rosette motif on a pale blue background, affixed to kraft cardboard.
Die-cut stickers of Ernst Haeckel-style botanical/biological illustrations on a kraft paper background. Central sticker shows a red clustered spike rising from gold-ringed spherical forms.
Die-cut sticker of a red and gold ornate sea creature, likely a starfish or coral, on a tan surface with other stickers nearby.
Star-shaped sticker featuring a detailed scientific illustration of a sea urchin, in deep red and brown tones, on a wood surface.
Scallop-edged sticker of a sea spider or pycnogonid, printed on lavender background, resting on kraft paper.
Die-cut sticker of deep-red tube worms with golden feathery plumes, styled in vintage scientific illustration. Several other marine creature stickers visible on a kraft paper background.
Die-cut sticker of a detailed scientific illustration of a starfish, red and tan toned, on kraft paper. Other marine biology stickers are partially visible around the edges.
Die-cut starfish sticker with detailed pink and red illustration, resting on a kraft cardboard surface alongside other sea creature stickers.
Vintage-style sea creature stickers on kraft paper, featuring a spiky red sun star center stage alongside partial starfish illustrations.
Die-cut sticker of an illustrated jellyfish in deep purples and reds, stuck on a kraft paper disc-bound notebook.
